title: FOUNDCRAFT
description: A Yumi-themed modpack designed for use in his discord community.
body:
## A Yumi-themed modpack designed for use in his discord community.

A vanilla++ pack that contains a vast array of features including furniture, dimensions, bosses, cooking, and many new building blocks all while being surrounded by a beautiful new world.

### Interested?

⭐ Feel free to join our Discord server! ⭐

## Copyrighted Content Attributions:

The following content is hosted outside of the Modrinth platform; all of which has been allowed here by their respective authors.

- [Mandela's GUI - Dark mode](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)
- [(Unofficial) Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode Mod Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unofficial-mandalas-gui-dark-mode-mod)
- [Public GUI Announcement](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/public-gui-announcement) (1.0.7+)
- [Paintings++](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paintings) (1.0.7+)
